samples.text: Snow falls upward into the sky from the ground. Is this expected based on common sense?
Snow rises from the ground up into the sky. Does this match everyday common sense?
Snowflakes travel upward from the ground into the air. Is this expected based on common sense?
Gravity pulls snow downward. Snow falls down, not up. Is the described situation expected based on common sense?
Snow falls upward into the sky from the ground. Someone left the door open earlier. Is this expected based on common sense?
